__warnings.note: Used 'Kufamba' (to travel/walk) since the app brand is 'Rwendo'. Reviewer: confirm Kufamba is OK for the tab label, or suggest e.g. 'Nzendo' (journey, plural).
Used 'Mbiri' (info about a person). Common app conventions in Zim sometimes leave this as 'Profile'. Reviewer: pick what's natural.
Translated as 'Tsvarara' (a continuous run/streak). 'Sitirikiri' (borrow from English) is also common in apps. Pick whichever feels more natural to a Shona-speaking learner.
Used 'Kanzura' (modern borrow). Alternative: 'Rega' (let go / drop). Pick the one Zim-Shona app users will recognise.
Used 'Wedzera' (add / increase) for upgrade. Borrow 'Apgireda' is also seen. Pick what reads more natural.
Tone/voice descriptions ('Warm storyteller' etc.) are subjective. Translations are functional, not poetic — feel free to rewrite.

Long-form description of Victoria Falls. Reviewer should rewrite freely — the English original was written for an English speaker, the Shona equivalent is best authored from a Shona speaker's perspective.

REWRITTEN as Shona-chrome around English content (the mirror of the en version, which has English-chrome around Shona content). Pedagogically: an English-speaker reading en gets exposure to Shona idioms; a Shona-speaker reading sn should get exposure to English idioms. Reviewer: confirm the English idioms used ('It takes a village to raise a child', 'Practice makes perfect', 'Birds of a feather...', 'How are you?') are familiar/useful, and that the Shona explanations land naturally.

Other strings hardcode 'Shona' as the target language assuming the en-speaker-learning-sn direction (e.g. onboarding's 'How much Shona do you know?', 'Why do you want to learn Shona?', the big greeting hero showing the Shona word). Those need to either be parameterised with {{lang}} pulled from learnedLanguage.name, OR re-authored per pack. Outside the scope of this draft — flagged for follow-up.
Long-form marketing copy. Translations are literal — a native speaker should rewrite for natural flow.

10 FAQ entries. Q+A pairs translated literally. Domain-specific terms (Anthropic, Claude, Supabase, ElevenLabs, App Store, RevenueCat) kept as-is. Some answers reference UI labels — when those flip in sn, the FAQ wording should track them.
Mentions support@rwendo.app verbatim — kept as English address.
Vendor names (Anthropic, ElevenLabs, Supabase) kept English. Surrounding text translated.
Language names — used Shona endonyms where common (e.g. 'Spanish' → 'ChiSpanish'). Reviewer: confirm naming convention; some Shona speakers just say the English language name.
Features lists are functional UI copy — literal translation, may sound stiff. Reviewer should rewrite for natural flow.
Marketing taglines — literal. Reviewer free to rewrite for emotional resonance.
'A$10/mo', '60 min', '5 minutes a day' kept with Arabic numerals. Currency code A$ kept as-is. Reviewer: confirm convention.
Legal/destructive consequence text. Translation is conservative; reviewer should ensure the warning is unambiguous in Shona.

travel.hero_sub: Hunyanzvi hwako hweShona + ruzivo rwetsika + mutungamiri wezvekufamba — Rwendo munyika chaiyo.

phrasebook.title: Bhuku reMashoko
phrasebook.desc: Mashoko anodiwa pamamiriro ezvinhu — paendeshi, paimba yevaeni, pamusika, panenhamo

culture.title: Mutungamiri weTsika
culture.desc: Tsika, magariro, uye zvaunofanira kutarisira muZimbabwe

money.title: Mari neMusika
money.desc: Mitengo, kutengeranisa, mari yeZiG, kufamba mumusika

transport.title: Kubva kuEndeshi kuGuta
transport.desc: Nzira dzemakombi, mazano emaTaxi, kufamba muHarare neBulawayo

travellers.title: Sangana neVafambi
travellers.desc: Sangana nevamwe vari kudzidza Shona uye vari kushanyira Zimbabwe

safari.title: Safari neMapaki
safari.desc: Hwange, Victoria Falls, Great Zimbabwe — mutungamiri wako

notify.title: Rwen ari kurongedza
notify.body: Travel Mode iri kuvakwa. Ramba uchidzidza Shona yako — paunosvika muHarare, Rwen acharidziridza kukutungamira.
notify.email_body: Mhoro Rwen, ndokumbira undizivise kana Travel Mode yatanga!
notify.fallback_body: Tumira email kunaye hello@rwendo.app, isu tichakuwedzera pane runyorwa rwekutanga.

spotlight.label: NZVIMBO YEKUSHANYIRA
spotlight.title: 🌊 Victoria Falls
spotlight.desc: Imwe yeShanu Yenatural Wonders dzeNyika, paZambezi River pakati peZimbabwe neZambia. Mutsika dzeShona, inzvimbo inoyera — musha wemidzimu yemvura.

tips: Rwendo rwese rwakanaka runotanga neshoko 'Hello'. Watotanga rwendo rwako.
MuChiNgezi: 'It takes a village to raise a child' — zvinoreva mwana anokurirwa nemhuri yose. Govera zvaunodzidza nhasi nemumwe.
Shoko 'a' ndere chimwe, 'an' ndere chinotanga ne-vowel — bhii rimwe, kunzwisisa kukuru.
Tea iri padyo nehupenyu hweBritish — kwete chinwiwa chete asi tsika. Vagari veko vanonwa 'cuppa' zuva rega rega.
MuChiNgezi: 'Practice makes perfect' — kudzidzira kunopa hunyanzvi. Ramba uchivaka, izwi neizwi.
Zano raRwen: dzidzira chidzidzo chako chekupedzisira nemuromo nhasi. Kutaura kwakanaka ka10 kupfuura kuverenga.
'How are you?' — masirabi matatu anozarura masuwo ese munyika dzinotaura ChiNgezi.
Uri kudzidza mutauro unotaurwa nemamiriyoni. Izwi rega rega raunoziva, hukama hwakavakwa.

daily_goal_screen.title: Chinangwa cheXP cheZuva
daily_goal_screen.subtitle: Unoda kudzidza zvakawanda sei zuva nezuva?
daily_goal_screen.hint: Unogona kuchinja izvi nguva chero. Chinangwa chinotangazve zuva rega rega panguva yepakati peusiku (nguva yedhivhaisi yako).

about.title: Pamusoro peRwendo

what_card.title: Rwendo chii?
what_card.body: Rwendo (zita reShona rinoreva 'kufamba kunoenda kure') iApp yekudzidza mutauro neShamwari yeAI. Dzidza Shona naRwen — chameleon ane unyoro, anoshandiswa neClaude AI neElevenLabs voice — kuburikidza nenzira yezvidzidzo zvine zvikamu 7 yakavakirwa pakuongorora kwekudzidza mutauro wechipiri.

meet_card.title: Sangana naRwen
meet_card.body: Rwen i-chameleon, chisikwa chinoshandura iwo zvichienzanirana nezvinhu zvakapoteredza. Rwen anodzidza pamusoro pako uye anoshandura mataurirwo, mafundisirwo, uye matsigirirwo aanokupa. Pawaunotaura naye, ndiko paanonyatsokuziva nani.

method_card.title: Nzira yeRwendo
method_card.body: Zvikamu 7 muchidzidzo chimwe: Hook → Chunks → Pattern → Practice → Dialogue → Recall → Mission. Mashoko matsva ari pakati pe3 pachidzidzo chimwe. Maminitsi 5–7 pachidzidzo. Yakavakirwa pamatanho 10 eSLA, anosanganisira spaced repetition, comprehensible input, neoutput inereva.

builders_card.title: Yakavakwa nani
builders_card.body: Mugadziri ari woga muAustralia anotenda kuti kudzidza mutauro kunofanira kunzwa sehurukuro neshamwari, kwete basa rakaoma.

about.footer:
Yakavakwa neḥwirishe ❤️ kune vose vari kudzidza Shona
Mhoro!

help.title: Rubatsiro neMibvunzo
help.intro: Mhinduro dzakakurumidza kumibvunzo inonyanya kunzwa Rwen.
help.contact_btn: Uchada rubatsiro? Tumira email kuna support@rwendo.app

faq.a: Dzvanya pa-tab yaRwen pakati pebhawa repasi. Unogona kunyora message kana kubata bhatani re-mic kuti utaure. Dzvanya 🎙 kumusoro kurudyi kuti utange hurukuro yakasununguka pasina maoko.

Rwen iAI (Claude). AI inogona kukanganisa — kusanganisira mhosho dzezvokwadi nekushandura kusina kunaka. Tarisa Rwen seshamwari yekutaura, kwete sebhuku rezvidzidzo. Pamusoro pezvinokosha, ongorora nemumwe munhu anotaura Shona.
Pedzisa zvidzidzo paLearn tab. Mhinduro yega yega yakanaka inopa XP, uye kupedza chidzidzo kunopa bhonasi. Chinangwa chako cheXP chezuva chinotangazve zuva rega rega.
Vhura app uye upedze chinhu chimwe pazuva rega rega kuti tsvarara yako irambe ichirarama. Ukashaya zuva, tsvarara inotangazve pa1.
Hongu — enda kuMbiri → Izwi raRwen utore George, Charlie, Jessica, kana Alice. Kuchinja kunoshanda nokukurumidza pakutaura.

Mameseji ako anotumirwa kuAnthropic (Claude) kuti agadzirise mhinduro dzaRwen, uye anochengetwa muSupabase kwemwedzi 12. Anthropic HAANDIRE-shandisi hurukuro dzako kudzidzisa modeli yavo. Mavambo eizwi anobviswa mukati memaawa 24. Vhura Privacy Policy kuti uone zvizere.
Subscription dzinochengetwa kuburikidza ne-app store yako (App Store kana Google Play). Vashandisi vekuEU/UK vane mazuva 14 ekupinda neke-out, paunogona kukanzura uchipuhwa mari yose.
Mbiri → Dzima Account neZvose Zvedhata. Izvi zvinobvisa profile, kufambira zvidzidzo, uye history yehurukuro mukati memazuva 30. Chiito ichi hachigoni kudzoreredzwa.
Dzvanya "Tibate" pasi kana utumire email kuna support@rwendo.app. Sanganisira dhivhaisi yako, vhezheni yeapp, neizvo zvawanga uchiita pawakawana bug.
Iri kuvakwa. Mafoni ehurukuro asina maoko naRwen achauya neCompanion subscription tier mukuvandudzwa kunouya.

privacy_screen.title: Magadziriro eZvakavanzika
privacy_screen.intro: Tonga zvine Rwendo rinochengeta pamusoro pako. Kuti uone mutemo wose, verenga Privacy Policy.

clear.label: Bvisa history yehurukuro
clear.sub: Bvisa meseji rega rega rawakatuma kuna Rwen.
clear.confirm_body: Izvi zvichabvisa zvachose meseji rega rega rawakaita naRwen. Kufambira zvidzidzo neaccount yako zvinosara zvakakwana. Hazvigoni kudzoreredzwa.

export_row.label: Buritsa dhata yangu
export_row.sub: Tora kopi yeprofile, kufambira, nehurukuro dzako.

anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.sub: Inogashira meseji yako kuti igadzire mhinduro dzaRwen. Haishandiswi pakudzidzisa.

elevenlabs.label: ElevenLabs (izwi)
elevenlabs.sub: Inogadzira izwi raRwen uye inochinja rako kuita zvinyorwa. Audio inobviswa mukati memaawa 24.

supabase.label: Supabase (database)
supabase.sub: Inochengeta account, kufambira, nehistory yehurukuro yako.

privacy_screen.note: Kuti udzime account yako yose, dzokera kuMbiri → Dzima Account neZvose Zvedhata.

language_pack_screen.title: Pakiji yeMutauro
language_pack_screen.subtitle: Chinjira pakati pemitauro
language_pack_screen.available_curriculum_sub: Zvidzidzo 100 · Mamoduru 1–10 · Nzira yeRwendo ine zvikamu 7
language_pack_screen.coming_soon_alert_body: Tiri kunyora curriculum ye{{name}} ikozvino. Garamira paShona-English kuti uwane Nzira yeRwendo izere, isu tichakuzivisa pakangoita {{name}}.

export_screen.title: Buritsa dhata yangu
export_screen.hero_body: Gadzira kopi yeJSON yeprofile, kufambira zvidzidzo, nehistory yehurukuro naRwen. Unogona kuzitumira email, kuchengeta muFiles, kana kuzitumira kupi nekupi paunoda.

lesson_progress.label: Kufambira chidzidzo
lesson_progress.desc: Chidzidzo chega chega chakapera, nemamakisi neXP

export_screen.note: Dhata yako inogadzirwa pa-dhivhaisi kubva paSupabase, uye inotumirwa chete pawunenge wasarudza kugovera. Hapana chinotumirwa kuparty yechitatu.

plans_screen.title: Pulani
plans_screen.subtitle: Sarudza rwendo runokwana iwe
plans_screen.hero_body: Tanga uri free uchiine zvidzidzo zvose 100. Wedzera kana uchida Rwen seshamwari yako yekutaura.
plans_screen.footnote: Vatengi vekuEU/UK vanowana mazuva 14 ekupinda neke-out vachiine refund izere. Kanzura nguva chero.
plans_screen.alert_body: Subscription dzinotanga nekuvandudzwa kunouya. Tiri kushandirana neRevenueCat kuti billing ifambe zvakanaka uye refund-friendly. Imbomira!

learning.reminders_enabled_body: Tichachengeta sarudzo yako. Push notifications dzichauya nekuvandudzwa kunouya.

support_rows.no_email_app_body: Ndapota tumira email kuna support@rwendo.app uchishandisa email app yaunoda.

delete_account.confirm_body: Izvi zvichadzima account yako nekufambira kwose nokusingaperi. Hazvigoni kudzoreredzwa.
delete_account.error_body: Hazvina kukwana kudzimwa account. Ndapota edzazve.
